title: ruellia serrana
intro: Ruellia serrana, also known as the Serra ruellia, is a flowering plant species native to Brazil. It is a member of the Acanthaceae family and is commonly used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Ruellia serrana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application or added to baths for its therapeutic properties.
